sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110691" key="fqei=sai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθεῖσαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθείσει</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθεῖτο</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθεῖσθαι</orth>, <sense id="n110691.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φθίω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
